title: cyanus lingulatus
intro: Cyanus lingulatus, also known as the Cornflower or Nootka Lupine, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyanus lingulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
